novel.gloss: An upgrade option that includes additional amenities and services.
novel.span: On arrival we were asked if we wanted to upgrade our stay for $50 a night.. Better room, free wi fi, breakfast for two, club lounge including afternoon tea, free coffee and soft drinks all day, 2 hrs
